summary: The journey spans the upper body and a wide bottom friction row explains the main breakdowns stage by stage.
composition_pattern: top journey hero, lower friction row, compact side or edge synthesis
support_structure: wide friction row beneath the journey
optional compact insight stack or summary strip at the side or lower edge
when_to_use: The sequence itself should dominate the page
Most of the support evidence belongs directly under journey stages
avoid_when: The slide needs a visible persona panel
The page requires a strong right-side synthesis column
